## Meeting Purpose

[Explore GrowthX's AI-powered content creation capabilities for potential use at One New Zealand.](https://fathom.video/share/vR4weyZ-qikfGyPBM57vrcse2vnsAF3_?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX offers a hybrid service-platform model, leveraging AI workflows and human expertise to scale high-quality content production](https://fathom.video/share/vR4weyZ-qikfGyPBM57vrcse2vnsAF3_?tab=summary&timestamp=46.0)
  - [Their process emphasizes deep customer understanding, editorial quality, and fact-checking to maintain trust and accuracy](https://fathom.video/share/vR4weyZ-qikfGyPBM57vrcse2vnsAF3_?tab=summary&timestamp=65.0)
  - [One NZ sees potential in applying GrowthX's approach to accelerate B2B growth and improve marketing efficiency across segments](https://fathom.video/share/vR4weyZ-qikfGyPBM57vrcse2vnsAF3_?tab=summary&timestamp=294.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX's Offering and Approach

  - [Hybrid service-platform model combining AI workflows with human expertise](https://fathom.video/share/vR4weyZ-qikfGyPBM57vrcse2vnsAF3_?tab=summary&timestamp=46.0)
  - [Focus on scaling content engines, primarily editorial/long-form content](https://fathom.video/share/vR4weyZ-qikfGyPBM57vrcse2vnsAF3_?tab=summary&timestamp=35.0)
  - [End-to-end support: strategy, execution, imagery, staging, and publishing](https://fathom.video/share/vR4weyZ-qikfGyPBM57vrcse2vnsAF3_?tab=summary&timestamp=806.0)
  - [Team structure: Chief Content Officer (ex-TechCrunch), Managing Directors (20+ years SEO/growth experience), Managing Editors](https://fathom.video/share/vR4weyZ-qikfGyPBM57vrcse2vnsAF3_?tab=summary&timestamp=1000.0)

### Content Creation Process

  - [8-week strategy sprint to develop artifacts and calibrate approach](https://fathom.video/share/vR4weyZ-qikfGyPBM57vrcse2vnsAF3_?tab=summary&timestamp=1263.0)
  - [Deep research into client's business, personas, and content guidelines](https://fathom.video/share/vR4weyZ-qikfGyPBM57vrcse2vnsAF3_?tab=summary&timestamp=1302.0)
  - [Use of AI workflows for research, outlining, drafting, and fact-checking](https://fathom.video/share/vR4weyZ-qikfGyPBM57vrcse2vnsAF3_?tab=summary&timestamp=1649.0)
  - [Human-in-the-loop at every stage for quality control and refinement](https://fathom.video/share/vR4weyZ-qikfGyPBM57vrcse2vnsAF3_?tab=summary&timestamp=1637.0)
  - [Emphasis on maintaining high editorial standards and factual accuracy](https://fathom.video/share/vR4weyZ-qikfGyPBM57vrcse2vnsAF3_?tab=summary&timestamp=1774.0)

### AI Platform Capabilities

  - [Custom-built platform for workflow management and content generation](https://fathom.video/share/vR4weyZ-qikfGyPBM57vrcse2vnsAF3_?tab=summary&timestamp=1448.0)
  - [Workflow engine with coding agents for quick adaptation](https://fathom.video/share/vR4weyZ-qikfGyPBM57vrcse2vnsAF3_?tab=summary&timestamp=1513.0)
  - [Pipeline creation for different content plays (e.g., programmatic, editorial)](https://fathom.video/share/vR4weyZ-qikfGyPBM57vrcse2vnsAF3_?tab=summary&timestamp=1570.0)
  - [Inline AI-assisted content refinement tools](https://fathom.video/share/vR4weyZ-qikfGyPBM57vrcse2vnsAF3_?tab=summary&timestamp=1743.0)
  - [Rigorous fact-checking process using passage splitting and confidence scoring](https://fathom.video/share/vR4weyZ-qikfGyPBM57vrcse2vnsAF3_?tab=summary&timestamp=1793.0)

### One New Zealand's Context

  - [Telco serving all segments in a small market (5 million people, \~500k businesses)](https://fathom.video/share/vR4weyZ-qikfGyPBM57vrcse2vnsAF3_?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [More mature in consumer/mass market, less so in SMB and enterprise B2B](https://fathom.video/share/vR4weyZ-qikfGyPBM57vrcse2vnsAF3_?tab=summary&timestamp=312.0)
  - [Challenge: Hyper-personalization across diverse B2B verticals](https://fathom.video/share/vR4weyZ-qikfGyPBM57vrcse2vnsAF3_?tab=summary&timestamp=330.0)
  - [Current focus: Retaining existing customers and mass market acquisition](https://fathom.video/share/vR4weyZ-qikfGyPBM57vrcse2vnsAF3_?tab=summary&timestamp=403.0)
  - [Opportunity: Improve B2B marketing efficiency and owned/earned channel performance](https://fathom.video/share/vR4weyZ-qikfGyPBM57vrcse2vnsAF3_?tab=summary&timestamp=390.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Kyle to share meeting recording and booking link for follow-up call](https://fathom.video/share/vR4weyZ-qikfGyPBM57vrcse2vnsAF3_?tab=summary&timestamp=1979.0)
  - [Neeharika to discuss internally with B2B and B2C marketing teams](https://fathom.video/share/vR4weyZ-qikfGyPBM57vrcse2vnsAF3_?tab=summary&timestamp=1906.0)
  - [Schedule follow-up call with broader One NZ marketing team to explore GrowthX's potential application across segments](https://fathom.video/share/vR4weyZ-qikfGyPBM57vrcse2vnsAF3_?tab=summary&timestamp=1939.0)
